concepts.name: Blooming Flower
concepts.summary: A single hand-drawn flower blooms on load beside quietly set serif type, on warm paper-white space.

concepts.name: Half Moon
concepts.summary: A minimal moon with a soft terminator that slowly drifts toward half, over a calm navy sky and a whisper of starlight.

concepts.name: Ink Bloom
concepts.tagline: A drop of ink in still water
concepts.summary: A single ink drop slowly diffuses behind restrained serif type — sumi-e calm on warm paper.

concepts.name: Sunrise Wash
concepts.summary: A slow dawn-to-day light wash and one thin horizon line, behind quiet centered type.

concepts.name: Still Water
concepts.summary: Gentle concentric ripples spread across a still surface as type floats quietly above. Meditative.

concepts.name: Single Tree
concepts.summary: A delicate tree slowly grows fine branches and a few leaves; otherwise spare and paper-white.

concepts.name: Drifting Petals
concepts.summary: A handful of petals drift slowly down across an empty page; quiet type anchored below.

concepts.name: Pure Type
concepts.summary: No imagery — impeccable type and generous whitespace are the entire design. The most minimal of all.

concepts.name: Breathing Circle
concepts.summary: A soft circle expands and contracts at a calm breathing pace, echoing a daily meditation.

concepts.name: Paper Unfold
concepts.summary: Soft paper / origami folds gently reveal the page; warm paper texture and subtle fold shadows.

concepts.name: Brushstroke
concepts.summary: A single sumi-e brushstroke paints itself once, slowly, in vast white space. Zen.

concepts.name: Pressed Botanical
concepts.summary: Herbarium elegance: delicate botanical line art, hairline rules, and archival serif labels.

concepts.name: Dewdrop
concepts.summary: One luminous dewdrop rests on a hairline with the faintest refraction; otherwise extremely spare.

concepts.name: Tide
concepts.summary: A tideline gently rises and recedes at the foot of the page; patient and rhythmic.

concepts.name: Candle Flame
concepts.summary: A soft candle flame flickers gently in a quiet dark; type emerges softly near the light.
